programme.title: Maze Runner: The Death Cure
programme.desc: Thomas leads some escaped Gladers on their final and most dangerous mission yet. To save their friends, they must break into the legendary Last City, a WCKD-controlled labyrinth that may turn out to be the deadliest maze of all. Starring Dylan OBrien, Thomas Brodie-Sangster, Kaya Scodelario.

programme.title: Man of Steel
programme.desc: Though struggling with the ramifications of his extraordinary origin and abilities, young Clark Kent (Henry Cavill) must become a hero and save those he loves from a dire threat. Starring Henry Cavill, Amy Adams, Michael Shannon.

programme.title: Batman v Superman: Dawn of Justice
programme.desc: Convinced that Superman (Henry Cavill) is now a threat to humanity, Batman (Ben Affleck) embarks on a personal vendetta to end his reign on Earth, while the conniving Lex Luthor (Jesse Eisenberg) launches his own crusade against the Man of Steel. Starring Ben Affleck, Henry Cavill, Amy Adams.

programme.title: The Act
programme.desc: Gypsy and Nick scheme to meet in person and hope to win Dee Dees approval, but when their plan goes disastrously wrong theyll be pushed to make an extreme choice in order to be together.

programme.title: The Act
programme.desc: While Gypsy and Nick are on the run, flashbacks to a much younger Dee Dee reveal how trauma with her own mother set her up for conflict with Gypsy.

programme.title: The Imaginarium of Dr Parnassus
programme.desc: After a carnival troupe saves his life, a man (Heath Ledger) agrees to help its immortal leader (Christopher Plummer) collect five souls and win a bet with the devil. Starring Heath Ledger, Christopher Plummer, Verne Troyer.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: While investigating the disappearance of an old college friend, Will finds himself caught in an underground fight club.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Dr. Magnus and the Sanctuary team attempt to capture a rare and deadly creature while under the watchful eye of a local news crew.

programme.title: Goose!
programme.desc: A boy (Max Morrow) conspires to save a talking gander from a man (Chevy Chase) who plans to cook the bird in an upcoming culinary contest. Starring Chevy Chase, Kari Matchett, Max Morrow.

programme.title: My Little Pony: The Movie
programme.desc: Twilight Sparkle, Applejack, Rainbow Dash, Pinkie Pie, Fluttershy and Rarity embark on an epic journey to save Ponyville from a dark force. Starring Emily Blunt, Kristin Chenoweth, Liev Schreiber.

programme.title: Curly Sue
programme.desc: A con man (James Belushi) targets a corporate lawyer (Kelly Lynch) and steals her heart with his adorable adopted daughter (Alisan Porter). Starring Jim Belushi, Kelly Lynch, Alisan Porter.

programme.title: Ozzy
programme.desc: A lovable dog must rely on some new friends to help it break out of canine prison and get back home to his owners. Starring Jeff Foxworthy, Rob Schneider, Frankie Quiñones.

programme.title: The Games Maker
programme.desc: Ivans love of board games transports him into the competitive world of game invention. Starring Joseph Fiennes, Tom Cavanagh, Megan Charpentier.

programme.title: Wallace and Gromit: The Curse of the Were-Rabbit
programme.desc: Pest controllers Wallace (Peter Sallis) and Gromit must save the day when a vegetable-munching beast ravages town gardens. Starring Peter Sallis, Ralph Fiennes, Helena Bonham Carter.

programme.title: Where the Wild Things Are
programme.desc: Sent to bed without supper, a mischievous boy enters a land that grows out of his imagination and becomes king of the fantastic creatures who live there. Starring Catherine Keener, Max Records, Mark Ruffalo.

programme.title: Labyrinth
programme.desc: Teenage Sarah (Jennifer Connelly) journeys through a maze to recover her baby brother (Toby Froud) from a goblin king (David Bowie). Starring David Bowie, Jennifer Connelly, Toby Froud.

programme.title: Outlander: Blood of my Blood
programme.desc: Henry tackles a challenging assignment in his own way; Ellen learns some concerning information about the family into which shes expected to marry.

programme.title: Venom
programme.desc: Journalist Eddie Brock develops superhuman strength and power when his body merges with the alien Venom. Twisted, dark and fueled by rage, Venom tries to control the new and dangerous abilities that Eddie finds so intoxicating. Starring Tom Hardy, Michelle Williams, Riz Ahmed.

programme.title: Dont You Forget About Me
programme.desc: Four filmmakers travel to Illinois to find filmmaker John Hughes.

programme.title: Polytechnique
programme.desc: A misogynist massacres female engineering students. Starring Maxim Gaudette, Sebastien Huberdeau, Karine Vanasse.

programme.title: Second Act
programme.desc: After losing a promotion to a college-educated candidate, a frustrated assistant manager sets out to prove to Madison Avenue that street smarts are as valuable as book smarts -- and its never too late for a second act. Starring Jennifer Lopez, Vanessa Hudgens, Leah Remini.

programme.title: Rebelle
programme.desc: African rebels force a village girl (Rachel Mwanza) to kill her own parents and join their army, but a miraculous event makes the rebels think she has supernatural powers. Starring Rachel Mwanza, Alain Bastien, Serge Kanyinda.

programme.title: Maudie
programme.desc: From childhood to her deathbed, a woman experiences love, loss and discrimination. Starring Patricia Ann Hoffman, Meberate Brooks, Kayla Monnot-Edwards.

programme.title: Dolphin Tale
programme.desc: A marine biologist (Harry Connick Jr.), a prosthetics designer (Morgan Freeman) and a boy band together to save the life of a dolphin whose tail was severely damaged in a trap. Starring Harry Connick, Ashley Judd, Nathan Gamble.

programme.title: Rocky
programme.desc: Heavyweight champ Apollo Creed gives Philadelphia club fighter Rocky Balboa (Sylvester Stallone) a title shot. Starring Sylvester Stallone, Talia Shire, Burgess Meredith.

programme.title: Rocky II
programme.desc: Underdog Philadelphia fighter Rocky Balboa (Sylvester Stallone) gets another shot at heavyweight champ Apollo Creed. Starring Sylvester Stallone, Talia Shire, Burgess Meredith.

programme.title: Rocky III
programme.desc: Following his crushing defeat by Clubber Lang, Rocky Balboa joins forces with Apollo Creed in an effort to regain his title. Starring Sylvester Stallone, Mr. T, Talia Shire.

programme.title: Rocky IV
programme.desc: Heavyweight champion Rocky Balboa trains in Siberia for a match against the Soviet fighter who killed Apollo Creed. In front of a ferocious Russian crowd, he fights for one final showdown. Starring Sylvester Stallone, Talia Shire, Burt Young.

programme.title: Rocky V
programme.desc: Broke, punchy and at odds with his son, boxer Rocky (Sylvester Stallone) trains a hungry contender, then must street-fight him. Starring Sylvester Stallone, Talia Shire, Burt Young.

programme.title: Rocky Balboa
programme.desc: Retired Rockys (Sylvester Stallone) plan to re-enter the ring for a few small matches escalates into a full-fledged bout with the worlds reigning heavyweight. Starring Sylvester Stallone, Burt Young, Antonio Tarver.

programme.title: Halloween Ends
programme.desc: Four years after her last encounter with Michael Myers, Laurie Strode finally decides to liberate herself and embrace life. However, a local murder unleashes a cascade of violence and terror, forcing her to confront the evil she cant control. Starring Jamie Lee Curtis, Andi Matichak, James Jude Courtney.

programme.title: The Strangers
programme.desc: Three masked assailants terrorize a young couple (Liv Tyler, Scott Speedman) in a romantic getaway to a remote cottage. Starring Liv Tyler, Scott Speedman, Gemma Ward.

programme.title: Double Happiness
programme.desc: Pleasing her Chinese-Canadian father (Stephen Chang) means an aspiring actress (Sandra Oh) must sacrifice her own pursuits. Starring Sandra Oh, Stephen A. Chang, Alannah Ong.

programme.title: The Sweet Hereafter
programme.desc: A lawyer (Ian Holm) seeks input from parents who lost children in a Canadian bus crash that claimed 14 lives. Starring Ian Holm, Sarah Polley, Bruce Greenwood.

programme.title: The Death and Life of John F. Donovan
programme.desc: A young actor reminisces about a dead American TV star and the correspondence they shared. Starring Kit Harington, Natalie Portman, Jacob Tremblay.

programme.title: Ballerina
programme.desc: A look at the Australian Ballets first aboriginal dancer and her impact on the industry. Featuring interviews, dance sequences, and archive footage that showcases how Ella remains grounded in her own culture while performing.

programme.title: Annie
programme.desc: Daddy Warbucks (Albert Finney) protects little orphan Annie (Aileen Quinn) from Miss Hannigan (Carol Burnett) and crooks in Depression-era New York. Starring Aileen Quinn, Albert Finney, Carol Burnett.

programme.title: The Wizard of Oz
programme.desc: After a tornado whisks Kansas farm girl Dorothy (Judy Garland) to a magic land, she must travel to the Emerald City for help in getting back home. Starring Judy Garland, Frank Morgan, Ray Bolger.

programme.title: The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring
programme.desc: A chosen hobbit (Elijah Wood) and his loyal friends join a wizard (Ian McKellen), humans, a dwarf and an elf on a quest to destroy a powerful ring and defeat an evil lord. Starring Elijah Wood, Ian McKellen, Liv Tyler.

programme.title: The Lord of the Rings: The Two Towers
programme.desc: Now divided, members of a fellowship take different paths to destroy the ring and defeat evil Sauron and his pawns. Starring Elijah Wood, Ian McKellen, Liv Tyler.

programme.title: The Lord of the Rings: The Return of the King
programme.desc: Frodo (Elijah Wood) and Sam march toward Mount Doom to destroy the ring, while Gandalf (Ian McKellen) and warriors prepare for a final confrontation with Sauron and his allies. Starring Elijah Wood, Ian McKellen, Liv Tyler.

programme.title: Outlander: Blood of my Blood
programme.desc: Henry tackles a challenging assignment in his own way; Ellen learns some concerning information about the family into which shes expected to marry.

programme.title: The Strangers: Chapter 1
programme.desc: After their car breaks down in an eerie small town, a young couple is forced to spend the night in a remote cabin. Panic ensues as they are terrorized by three masked strangers who strike with no mercy and seemingly no motive. Starring Madelaine Petsch, Froy Gutierrez, Gabriel Basso.

programme.title: The Strangers: Chapter 2
programme.desc: After learning that their victim, Maya, is still alive, three masked maniacs return to finish the job. With nowhere to run and no one to trust, Maya finds herself in a fight for survival against psychopaths wholl kill anyone who stands in their way. Starring Madelaine Petsch, Gabriel Basso, Froy Gutierrez.

programme.title: At First Light
programme.desc: A close encounter with mysterious lights sends two teens on the run after one discovers she has extraordinary but dangerous powers. Starring Stefanie Scott, Theodore Pellerin, Said Taghmaoui.

programme.title: Heavenly Bodies
programme.desc: Samantha quits her job to open an aerobics studio and competes with a larger clubs lead instructor to become an aerobics instructor on a local fitness television show. Starring Cynthia Dale, Richard Rebiere, Walter George Alton.

programme.title: Mad Youth
programme.desc: A teenager (Mary Ainslee) rivals her mother (Betty Compson) for a rumba-cafe gigolo (Willy Castello). Starring Mary Ainslee, Betty Compson, Willy Castello.

programme.title: High Society
programme.desc: A socialites (Grace Kelly) ex-husband (Bing Crosby) and a magazine writer (Frank Sinatra) show up for her wedding and cause havoc. Starring Bing Crosby, Grace Kelly, Frank Sinatra.

programme.title: Say Amen, Somebody
programme.desc: Filmmaker George T. Nierenberg surveys gospel music, featuring "Mother" Willie Mae Ford Smith and "Professor" Thomas A. Dorsey.

programme.title: Before Sunrise
programme.desc: An American (Ethan Hawke) and a Frenchwoman (Julie Delpy) meet on a train and spend a romantic day and night in Vienna. Starring Ethan Hawke, Julie Delpy, Erni Mangold.

programme.title: Ten Nights in a Barroom
programme.desc: A man begins drinking after he is swindled out of his mill. After his daughter is killed by a blow to the head during a bar fight, he is reborn and runs for mayor. Starring Charles Gilpin, Myra Burwell, Lawrence Chenault.

programme.title: Film, the Living Record of Our Memory
programme.desc: Archivists, curators, technicians, and filmmakers from around the world explain what film preservation is and why it is needed.

programme.title: Changing
programme.desc: A young family tries to cope with the shifting social values.

programme.title: About Face
programme.desc: Three cadets (Gordon MacRae, Eddie Bracken, Dick Wesson) try to fool a professor and graduate from a Southern military institute. Starring Gordon MacRae, Eddie Bracken, Dick Wesson.

programme.title: The West Point Story
programme.desc: A Broadway director (James Cagney) must turn cadet to stage a show with his girlfriend (Virginia Mayo) at the U.S. Military Academy. Starring James Cagney, Virginia Mayo, Doris Day.

programme.title: The Desert Song
programme.desc: An anthropologist (Gordon MacRae) impresses a French generals daughter (Kathryn Grayson) when he turns desert hero to foil a sheik. Starring Kathryn Grayson, Gordon MacRae, Steve Cochran.

programme.title: On Moonlight Bay
programme.desc: A teenage tomboy (Doris Day) with a fun family makes music with a college man (Gordon MacRae) in circa-World War I Indiana. Starring Doris Day, Gordon MacRae, Jack Smith.

programme.title: By the Light of the Silvery Moon
programme.desc: A World War I veteran (Gordon MacRae) makes his Indiana sweetheart (Doris Day) wait for marriage while he makes money. Starring Doris Day, Gordon MacRae, Leon Ames.

programme.title: Oklahoma!
programme.desc: Cowboy Curly (Gordon MacRae) loves Laurey (Shirley Jones) despite hired hand Jud Fry (Rod Steiger). Rodgers and Hammerstein songs include Oh What a Beautiful Mornin. Starring Gordon MacRae, Shirley Jones, Rod Steiger.

programme.title: Three Sailors and a Girl
programme.desc: Three guys join the leading lady (Jane Powell) in a Broadway show bankrolled by their submarine buddies. Starring Jane Powell, Gordon MacRae, Gene Nelson.

programme.title: Eat Drink Man Woman
programme.desc: A master chef hides his concerns about his three daughters by immersing himself in the preparation of sumptuous feasts. Starring Sihung Lung, Kuei-Mei Yang, Chien-Lien Wu.

programme.title: Knife in the Water
programme.desc: A Polish couple (Leon Niemczyk, Jolanta Umecka) picks up a student hitchhiker (Zygmunt Malanowicz) and takes him sailing. Starring Leon Niemczyk, Jolanta Umecka, Zygmunt Malanowicz.

programme.title: Cronos
programme.desc: An antiques dealer (Federico Luppi) finds an ancient artifact that grants him eternal life, but in the form of a vampire. Starring Federico Luppi, Ron Perlman, Claudio Brook.

programme.title: Mauvaise Graine
programme.desc: After losing his new car and allowance, Henri falls in love with one of his car-thief friends, and they decide to start over by moving to Casablanca. Starring Danielle Darrieux, Pierre Mingand, Raymond Galle.

programme.title: Picnic at Hanging Rock
programme.desc: In turn-of-the-century Australia, three young schoolgirls wander away from a school picnic and become lost in the bush. Starring Rachel Roberts, Dominic Guard, Helen Morse.

programme.title: Lolita
programme.desc: Professor Humbert Humbert (James Mason) marries a widow (Shelley Winters) to be near her nymphet daughter (Sue Lyon). Starring James Mason, Shelley Winters, Sue Lyon.

programme.title: Tarzans Savage Fury
programme.desc: Two impersonators attempt to trick the jungle king into leading them to the diamond-rich Wazuri region. Starring Lex Barker, Dorothy Hart, Patric Knowles.

programme.title: King of the Islands
programme.desc: A shipwrecked sailor falls in love with an island princess who is committed to a volcano. Starring Wini Shaw, Warren Hymer, Edward McWade.

programme.title: Its Always Fair Weather
programme.desc: A talk-show staffer (Cyd Charisse) puts a fight manager (Gene Kelly), adman (Dan Dailey) and cook on TV 10 years after they parted as GIs. Starring Gene Kelly, Dan Dailey, Cyd Charisse.

programme.title: A Canterbury Tale
programme.desc: A U.S. soldier (John Sweet), a British sergeant and a London girl (Sheila Sim) see minor miracles and catch a prude (Eric Portman). Starring Eric Portman, Sheila Sim, John Sweet.

programme.title: Tribute to a Bad Man
programme.desc: An Easterner (Don Dubbins) goes to work for a Colorado rancher (James Cagney) who keeps law and order with a rope. Starring James Cagney, Don Dubbins, Irene Papas.

programme.title: I Accuse!
programme.desc: Jewish French army Capt. Alfred Dreyfus (Jose Ferrer) is railroaded for treason and sent to Devils Island. Starring Jose Ferrer, Anton Walbrook, Viveca Lindfors.

programme.title: Goodbye Again
programme.desc: Stranded by her lover (Yves Montand), a 40-ish interior decorator (Ingrid Bergman) in Paris turns to a U.S. clients playboy son (Anthony Perkins). Starring Ingrid Bergman, Yves Montand, Anthony Perkins.

programme.title: Bonjour Tristesse
programme.desc: A French teen (Jean Seberg) recalls her father (David Niven), his mistress and another woman (Deborah Kerr) on the Riviera. Starring Deborah Kerr, David Niven, Jean Seberg.

programme.title: Who Killed Teddy Bear?
programme.desc: The hostess (Juliet Prowse) at a Manhattan disco receives nasty phone calls from a busboy (Sal Mineo) who works there. Starring Sal Mineo, Juliet Prowse, Jan Murray.

programme.title: Humoresque
programme.desc: A married socialite (Joan Crawford) falls tragically in love with a classical violinist (John Garfield). Starring Joan Crawford, John Garfield, Oscar Levant.

programme.title: Flamingo Road
programme.desc: A small-town Florida sheriff (Sydney Greenstreet) frames his political pawns (Zachary Scott) dancer girlfriend (Joan Crawford) for prostitution. Starring Joan Crawford, Zachary Scott, Sydney Greenstreet.

programme.title: Alfred the Great
programme.desc: Danish invader King Guthrum (Michael York) kidnaps the king of Wessexs (David Hemmings) queen (Prunella Ransome) in the ninth century. Starring David Hemmings, Michael York, Prunella Ransome.

programme.title: The Master of Ballantrae
programme.desc: Two Scottish brothers engage in fierce sibling rivalry while battling pirates, Indians and British soldiers. Starring Errol Flynn, Roger Livesey, Anthony Steel.

programme.title: Who Killed Teddy Bear?
programme.desc: The hostess (Juliet Prowse) at a Manhattan disco receives nasty phone calls from a busboy (Sal Mineo) who works there. Starring Sal Mineo, Juliet Prowse, Jan Murray.

programme.title: Sapphire
programme.desc: Scotland Yard detectives (Nigel Patrick, Michael Craig) probe the racially motivated murder of a young woman. Starring Nigel Patrick, Yvonne Mitchell, Michael Craig.

programme.title: Cabaret
programme.desc: Multiple Oscars went to this tale about an American chanteuse in Berlin caught in the rising tide of Nazism. Starring Liza Minnelli, Joel Grey, Michael York.

programme.title: An American in Paris
programme.desc: An American soldier (Gene Kelly) stays in Paris after World War II to paint and falls in love with a French beauty (Leslie Caron). Starring Gene Kelly, Leslie Caron, Oscar Levant.

programme.title: Waterloo Bridge
programme.desc: A ballet dancer (Vivien Leigh) and a British officer (Robert Taylor) cross stars on the eve of World War I. Starring Vivien Leigh, Robert Taylor, Lucile Watson.

programme.title: Love Before Breakfast
programme.desc: An oil tycoon (Preston Foster) in love with a socialite (Carole Lombard) sends his romantic rival (Cesar Romero) to Japan on business. Starring Carole Lombard, Preston Foster, Cesar Romero.

programme.title: Hands Across the Table
programme.desc: A manicurist (Carole Lombard) and a playboy (Fred MacMurray) try to marry for money; they fall in love with each other instead. Starring Carole Lombard, Fred MacMurray, Ralph Bellamy.

programme.title: Virtue
programme.desc: Accusations of murder complicate the life of an ex-prostitute whose marriage to a kind cabbie has helped change her life. Starring Carole Lombard, Pat OBrien, Mayo Methot.

programme.title: Siren of the Tropics
programme.desc: A West Indies woman (Josephine Baker) falls for a Frenchman (Pierre Batcheff) and becomes a star performer in Paris. Starring Josephine Baker, Pierre Batcheff, Regina Dalthy.

programme.desc: Filmmaker Regan Latimer takes an amusing, insightful, and deeply personal look at queer TV characters, and the transformative power of LGBTQ+ representation done right.

programme.title: Tales From The Void
programme.desc: Juans excitement at getting to hang out with his cousin Cedric and the popular guy, Kurt, quickly dissipates when he learns their ideal Friday night activity is biking through their quiet suburban town.

programme.title: Tales From The Void
programme.desc: Whit Barnett is obsessed with the idea of being famous; he devotes all his energy toward a vlog, and reality shows are a mainstay in his apartment.

programme.title: Cruise Ship Killers
programme.desc: A youth ministry attendee disappears aboard a cruise ship; someone in the ministry may have information on what happened; but they may be hiding important details about her whereabouts.

programme.title: Cruise Ship Killers

programme.desc: A minor traffic citation spirals into an all-consuming obsession for a young woman when she decides to take on the police and the city. Starring Molly Reisman, Sofia Banzhaf, Bessie Cheng.

programme.title: Hustle, Sizzle, and Smoke - Ribs and Pasta
programme.desc: Chef Biff Smith of Mobile Chef Atlanta Catering squares off against Chef Terrell Taylor of Grill Effect BBQ; the challenge features the classic combination of ribs and pasta.

programme.title: Hustle, Sizzle, and Smoke - Chicken and Avocado
programme.desc: Adaya and Jay throw down for a chance to compete in the semifinals; the contestants must incorporate chicken and avocado in their dishes, but the challenge doesnt come without a twist in the form of Phillip Ashley Chocolates.

programme.title: Hustle, Sizzle, and Smoke - Pulled Pork and Leafy Greens
programme.desc: The stage is set for the first thrilling semifinal matchup, Hanashi Weathers faces off against Steve Morales; the challenge is a mouthwatering pulled pork with a side of flavorful leafy greens; A surprise awaits the pitmasters.

programme.title: Hustle, Sizzle, and Smoke - Turkey and Sourdough
programme.desc: Adaya Nijay and Biff Smith throw down in this semifinal match; the pitmasters must create dishes featuring Turkey and Sourdough; an added surprise as Biff and Adaya must incorporate Morellis Gourmet Ice Cream into their creations.

programme.title: Shes Not Our Sister
programme.desc: After three sisters bury their father, family secrets are revealed that will alter their lives forever. But things really take a turn when a will is discovered that reveals that things are not as black and white as they thought them to be.

programme.title: Between Sisters
programme.desc: A bride and her sister set out to find their newly discovered siblings in order to invite them to the wedding.

programme.title: Family Time - The Will
programme.desc: Tony and Lisas family argue over who should take custody of their children if something happens to them.

programme.title: Family Time - No New Friends
programme.desc: When an old friend of Tonys moves into the neighborhood, the Stallworths realize things arent exactly as they seem.

programme.title: Family Time - Hospitality
programme.desc: Lisa invites Tonys godparents to stay for a few nights but no one can get them to leave.

programme.title: Family Time - No Lie Zone
programme.desc: Tony and Lisa ban all lying in the household, including the little white lies that hold the family together.

programme.title: Family Time - Lisas Leftovers
programme.desc: Lisa gets upset when her sister Lori begins dating her ex-boyfriend.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - The Talk
programme.desc: Bernie stops by the Playboy Mansion to get advice from Hugh Hefner on how to talk to Jordan about sex.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Five Stages of Bryana
programme.desc: Bernie and Wanda seek a child therapists help in figuring out why Bryana has become a bully; Wanda winds up caring for a guinea pig Bernie bought for Bryana.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Go Bernie, Its Your Birthday
programme.desc: On Bernies 40th birthday, he is electrically shocked by an old lady and forced to be a clown at a childrens party.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Thanksgiving
programme.desc: Bernie has to put his foot down after Mr. Diggs, Vanessas teacher, persuades her to become a vegetarian.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Big Brother
programme.desc: Bernie resorts to spying when he decides Vanessa is being secretive about her activities, but his security cameras pick up more than he bargained for.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Do Not Duplicate
programme.desc: Lovita convinces Steve to give Regina a key to his apartment instead of jewelry, but Regina is unimpressed with the gesture.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - E-Male Problems
programme.desc: Steve explains his reasons for excluding Regina from a dinner party with his parents in an e-mail that inadvertently gets sent to her.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Knit Picking
programme.desc: Steve is rattled when Regina pulls out all the stops for their one-month anniversary, including a romantic dinner.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Principals Pet
programme.desc: Steve takes advantage of his relationship with Regina when he arrives late and unprepared for a staff meeting.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Dual Intentions
programme.desc: Steve plays it cool when Regina attends a singles weekend, but their faith in each other is rattled by a series of ill-timed phone calls.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Dissin Cousins
programme.desc: A beautiful cousin (Kim Fields) visits and shows Regina disrespect in front her colleagues.

programme.title: My Other Mother
programme.desc: Adopted as a child, an anchorwoman (Essence Atkins) reconnects with her birth mother (Lynn Whitfield) and extended family when she attends the funeral of her father.

programme.title: Really Love
programme.desc: A rising Black painter tries to break into the competitive art world while balancing an unexpected romance with an ambitious law student.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Love Bug

programme.desc: A tribute to the distinctive and fascinating culture of Black marching bands - The Halftime Show.

programme.desc: Reviewing the highs and lows of season two, along with the bands, their style and what makes them unique.

programme.desc: Michael and Jay try to hide their disappointment with their anniversary gifts; Claire hopes to prepare a gourmet dinner for her parents.

programme.desc: Flu germs jeopardize Michaels chance to see basketball star LeBron James shoot hoops at Madison Square Garden.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids - Empty Nest
programme.desc: Michael and Jay look back on the fun times they have had.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids - Empty Nest

programme.title: Mann And Wife - Dont Kiss and Yell Mann
programme.desc: Daniels female sexual harassment training instructor makes a pass at him; Terri believes DJs new girlfriend isnt good for him.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Strapped Tease
programme.desc: Lovita (Terri J. Vaughn) helps Steve and Cedric (Steve Harvey, Cedric the Entertainer) plan a bachelor party; Bullethead (William Lee Scott) falls for his Internet pen pal. Guest Star: Nikki Cox.

programme.desc: A young woman (Matilda Lutz) makes a horrifying discovery after her boyfriend (Alex Roe) investigates a story about a mysterious video that kills people seven days after they watch it.

programme.desc: When New York City comes under attack from an alien invasion, a woman and other survivors try to find a way to safety. They soon learn that they must remain absolutely silent as the mysterious creatures are drawn to the slightest sound.

programme.title: The Haunting (1999)
programme.desc: A parapsychologist and three others stay in a house reputed to be the site of many awful tragedies and paranormal events.

programme.title: The Last Gunfight (2025)
programme.desc: As the worlds top assassins fight to the death in a ruthless underground tournament, a rogue crew has its own deadly agenda: survive the carnage, outplay the killers and take down the mastermind behind it all.

programme.title: Hard Home (2024)
programme.desc: After the shocking murder of her daughter, a woman turns her high-tech home into a trap for the killer, initiating a deadly game of cat and mouse where every move can be fatal.

programme.title: The Time Machine (2002)
programme.desc: A scientist (Guy Pearce) travels into the future and meets a race of people who fear hideous monsters living under the ground.

programme.title: Congo (1995)
programme.desc: Killer gorillas menace an ex-CIA agent (Laura Linney), a primatologist (Dylan Walsh) and others on a mission in Africa.

programme.title: Seaside (2018)
programme.desc: A woman decides to run away to the Oregon coast with her boyfriend when he inherits a family beach house.

programme.title: Supercop (1992)
programme.desc: A Hong Kong policeman (Jackie Chan) and a mainland policewoman (Michelle Yeaoh) meet, team up and join a drug ring to destroy it.

programme.title: Due Justice (2023)
programme.desc: Consumed by grief and driven by revenge, a former Marine embarks on a relentless mission to hunt down those responsible for the brutal murders of his beloved wife and daughter.

programme.title: Kindred (2025)
programme.desc: A pair of twisted, young criminals decide to break into a mansion for one big score, but they soon find out that the owners of the house are much more dangerous than they are.

programme.title: The Yards (2000)
programme.desc: A friends lure of easy money draws an ex-con into the corrupt world of his uncles subway-train business.

programme.title: The Gift (2000)
programme.desc: Telling fortunes to support herself and her daughter, a psychic widow (Cate Blanchett) assists the police in a missing persons case.

programme.title: Gone Baby Gone (2007)
programme.desc: Two private investigators (Casey Affleck, Michelle Monaghan) tread dangerous ground as they scour the Boston underworld for a kidnapped child.

programme.title: Lara Croft Tomb Raider: The Cradle of Life (2003)
programme.sub-title: Lara Croft Tomb Raider: The Cradle of Life (2003)
programme.desc: A globe-trotter (Angelina Jolie) must find Pandoras box before a maniacal scientist (Ciarán Hinds) can harness its power for world domination.

programme.title: 21 Jump Street (2012)
programme.desc: Two cops (Jonah Hill, Channing Tatum) must confront their teenage angst all over again when they go under cover as high-school students.

programme.title: 22 Jump Street (2014)
programme.desc: Officers Jenko and Schmidt begin to question their partnership after each infiltrates different cliques while undercover at a local college.

programme.title: Serpico (1973)
programme.desc: Based on the true story of Frank Serpico, who sacrificed his career to expose widespread corruption in the NYPD.

programme.title: The Girl on the Train (2016)
programme.desc: Rachel, who is devastated by her divorce, spends her commute fantasizing about the couple that lives in a house that her train passes. One morning, she sees something shocking and becomes entangled in a missing persons investigation.

programme.title: Friday the 13th - Part III (1982)
programme.desc: Killer Jason terrorizes teens (Dana Kimmell, Paul Kratka, Tracie Savage) and a biker gang.

programme.title: La Madrina: The Savage Life of Lorine Padilla (2020)
programme.sub-title: La Madrina: The Savage Life of Lorine Padilla (2020)
programme.desc: Lorine Padilla joins a street gang in the Bronx, N.Y., before becoming an activist and spiritual adviser.

programme.title: The Godfather (1972)
programme.desc: Crime boss Vito Corleone and his sons, the ruthless yet loyal members of the Corleone family, rule their secretive New York empire with an iron fist.

programme.title: Georgetown (2019)
programme.desc: An eccentric and smooth-talking social climber who seems to have everyone in Washington, D.C., wrapped around his finger is investigated after his wealthy, well-connected and much older wife turns up dead in their home.

programme.title: Everybody Wants Some!! (2016)
programme.desc: In 1980 Texas, a college freshman meets his new baseball teammates, an unruly group of disco-dancing, skirt-chasing partiers.

programme.title: Friday the 13th (1980)
programme.desc: The reopening of Camp Crystal Lake spells murder and mayhem for a group of sexually promiscuous counselors.

programme.title: Sleeping Dogs (2024)
programme.desc: Suffering from memory loss, a former homicide detective tries to solve a brutal murder that he cant recall. As he pieces together evidence from a decade-old investigation, he soon uncovers a sinister web of buried secrets tied to his forgotten past.

programme.title: The Talented Mr. Ripley (1999)
programme.desc: A young man (Matt Damon) travels to 1950s Italy and begins to assume the identity of a playboy (Jude Law) he was hired to bring back to the United States.

programme.title: Shakespeare in Love (1998)
programme.desc: Young William Shakespeare (Joseph Fiennes) falls for Viola (Gwyneth Paltrow), reawakening his creativity, but she is betrothed to Wessex.

programme.title: Bounce (2000)
programme.desc: An ad executive (Ben Affleck) seeks out the widow (Gwyneth Paltrow) of a stranger who swapped tickets with him before boarding an ill-fated flight.

programme.title: Frida (2002)
programme.desc: Mexican painter Frida Kahlo (Salma Hayek) marries fellow artist Diego Rivera who shares her radical political views.

programme.title: Captive (2015)
programme.desc: Recovering drug addict Ashley Smith (Kate Mara) reads Rick Warrens "The Purpose Driven Life" as armed fugitive Brian Nichols (David Oyelowo) holds her hostage in her apartment.

programme.title: The Intervention (2016)
programme.desc: A weekend getaway for four couples takes a sharp turn when one of the couples discovers the entire trip was orchestrated to host an intervention on their marriage.

programme.title: Bridget Jones: The Edge of Reason (2004)
programme.sub-title: Bridget Jones: The Edge of Reason (2004)
programme.desc: An attractive lawyer and Bridgets (Renee Zellweger) former boss (Hugh Grant) threaten her newfound happiness with Mark Darcy (Colin Firth).

programme.title: The Prince and Me (2004)
programme.desc: Paige, a premedical student, falls in love with Eddie, a Danish prince, who keeps his identity a secret.

programme.title: Save the Last Dance (2001)
programme.desc: A white teenager (Julia Stiles) moves to Chicago after her mothers death and falls for a black student (Sean Patrick Thomas) who shares her love of dance.

programme.title: The Stand-In (2020)
programme.desc: A stand-in takes over an actresss career and identity after performing her community service for tax evasion.

programme.title: Jersey Girl (2004)
programme.desc: A young woman (Liv Tyler) changes the life of a single father (Ben Affleck) who used to be a successful New York music publicist.

programme.title: Election (1999)
programme.desc: Tracy faces no competition in her high school election, but the civics teacher intervenes by encouraging the varsity football player to run for president, resulting in chaos.

programme.title: Muriels Wedding (1994)
programme.desc: An Australian social outcast (Toni Collette) moves to Sydney, cares for an ailing friend (Rachel Griffiths) and weds an Olympian needing citizen status.

programme.title: A Bad Moms Christmas (2017)
programme.desc: As if creating the perfect Christmas for their families isnt hard enough, under-appreciated and overburdened moms Amy, Kiki and Carla will have to do it while hosting and entertaining their own respective mothers during the holidays.

programme.title: Revolutionary Road (2008)
programme.desc: In the 1950s Connecticut, two suburbanites become increasingly dissatisfied with their marriage and societys expectations of conformity.

programme.title: Babel (2006)
programme.desc: A tragic accidents scope expands, catching four groups of people on three continents in its terrible grip.

programme.title: Boudica: Queen of War (2023)
programme.desc: Roman conquerors slay King Prasutagus, take away his children, and force his wife, Boudica, into subservience. Consumed by grief and a burning desire for justice, Boudica vows to reclaim her homeland from the clutches of the Romans.

programme.title: The Stand-In (2020)
programme.desc: A stand-in takes over an actresss career and identity after performing her community service for tax evasion.

programme.title: Lift (2022)
programme.desc: A remarkable ballet program enables homeless children to discover the magic of self-expression through dance.

programme.title: Breakfast at Tiffanys (1961)
programme.desc: New York playgirl Holly Golightly (Audrey Hepburn) puzzles a writer (George Peppard) who lives in her building.

programme.title: Roman Holiday (1953)
programme.desc: A young princess (Audrey Hepburn), tired of her constraints, runs off with a U.S. newsman (Gregory Peck) in Rome.

programme.title: Whitney (2018)
programme.desc: Filmmaker Kevin Macdonald examines the life and career of singer Whitney Houston. Features never-before-seen archival footage, exclusive recordings, rare performances and interviews with the people who knew her best.

programme.title: The Prize Winner of Defiance, Ohio (2005)
programme.sub-title: The Prize Winner of Defiance, Ohio (2005)
programme.desc: A 50s-era housewife (Julianne Moore) uses her wit and winnings from commercial jingle contests to help support her large family.

programme.title: Win a Date With Tad Hamilton! (2004)
programme.sub-title: Win a Date With Tad Hamilton! (2004)
programme.desc: Secretly in love with his friend (Kate Bosworth), a supermarket manager (Topher Grace) becomes jealous when she meets a famous actor (Josh Duhamel).

programme.desc: A cool teen (Freddie Prinze Jr.) bets a friend that he can transform the schools geekiest girl (Rachael Leigh Cook) into a prom queen.

programme.title: Double Jeopardy (1999)
programme.desc: In an insurance scam, a man fakes his death and sets his wife up to take the blame. After serving 10 years in prison, she sets out to get revenge, immune from the law since she cannot be re-prosecuted for the same crime.

programme.title: Ida Red (2021)
programme.desc: Crime boss Ida "Red" Walker turns to her son, Wyatt, to pull off one last heist to get out of prison. However, with the FBI closing in, Wyatt must soon choose between family and freedom.

programme.title: Guns Up (2025)
programme.desc: After a job goes horribly wrong, a man who moonlights as a mob henchman has one night to get his family out of the city while keeping his dark secret hidden.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction (1987)
programme.desc: A New York lawyer (Michael Douglas) with a wife (Anne Archer) and daughter sleeps with a client (Glenn Close) whose lust turns to hate.

programme.title: The To Do List (2013)
programme.desc: Determined to shed her uptight image, a high-school valedictorian (Aubrey Plaza) decides to lose her virginity before college begins. Realizing that she is out of her depth, she asks friends and family for advice.

programme.desc: A struggling new mother fights a generations-old presence lurking within her familys home, threatening her safety, her sanity, and the life of her infant child.

programme.title: Roman Holiday (1953)
programme.desc: A young princess (Audrey Hepburn), tired of her constraints, runs off with a U.S. newsman (Gregory Peck) in Rome.
